issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case scenarios in the instructions.
Skill is limited to Linux, not cross-platform.

scenarios.name: install-fail2ban
scenarios.rationale: Both responses include the required install and enable commands but neither explicitly states that the service is enabled after installation, so they receive a moderate score.

scenarios.name: configure-sshd-jail
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully meets the rubric, while Response A omits the required jail.local location and the note about not editing jail.conf.

scenarios.name: monitor-and-unban
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fully satisfy the rubric, providing the required commands and explanatory comments.
